{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Overlord spirit
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Overlord spirit]] can flare to warn others.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses his [[Overlord spirit]] to control [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
